examples: There is a wisteria twining round the big tree.
After seven series, the "for sale" signs are finally going up on Wisteria Lane.
The sun was shining, a breeze was blowing, and the trees, wisteria, and flowers were all in bloom.
On the walls, wisteria drapes over the outside, creating a barrier from the street.
Mendel showed many pleated frocks in light and airy fabrications that move with the wind much like the wisteria flowers that inspired his collection.
